title: VeloraOS 1.10.4 - Models Logo Updater Fix
releaseNotes: Fixes the Models homepage logo remaining undefined after upgrading from an older public-beta installation.
Stops the updater from replacing current frontend icon definitions with stale JavaScript icon data from the previous installation.
Keeps standalone local artwork preservation while deploying the current Models SVG and safe fallback icon.
Preserves accounts, chats, settings, installed models, licensing, device identity and secure rollback updates.
